name: Third Wave Coffee
vibe: Bright, minimalist, serious about pour-overs. Work-friendly until 4pm.

name: Blue Tokai
vibe: Single-origin nerds gather here. Expect a queue and a playlist you'll Shazam.

name: Matteo Coffea
vibe: Old-Bangalore charm on a bustling street. Great for people-watching.

name: Dyu Art Cafe
vibe: Tucked-away garden seating. Artsy, quiet, book-club energy.

name: Cafe Thulp
vibe: Burgers bigger than your face. Loud, fun, plan on a nap after.

name: Subko Coffee
vibe: Roastery vibes. Take the tasting flight, pretend you understand notes.

name: Araku Coffee
vibe: Tribal-grown beans, warm wood interiors. Feels like a hug.

name: Glen's Bakehouse
vibe: Birthday cakes and brunch plates. Always packed, always worth it.

name: Cafe Max
vibe: No-frills Euro café. Cheap, reliable, great for catching up.

name: Church Street Social
vibe: Industrial-chic pub-café hybrid. Loud after sundown, pick a corner.

name: Koshy's
vibe: Since 1940. Writers, journalists, filter coffee. Time-machine Bangalore.

name: Toit Brewpub
vibe: Craft beer institution. Weekends are a war zone, go on a Tuesday.

name: Airlines Hotel
vibe: Iconic open-air parking-lot café. Masala dosas under the trees.

name: Cafe Noir
vibe: Mall-fancy French café. Date-night safe bet, good desserts.

name: Rangoli Cafe
vibe: South Indian comfort, local crowd. Quick, cheap, exactly right.

name: Filter Coffee Co
vibe: The name does the heavy lifting. Tiny, strong, traditional.

name: The Hole In The Wall
vibe: Breakfast-all-day chaos. Order the eggs benedict, trust the process.

name: Smoke House Deli
vibe: Chalk-wall aesthetic, reliable menu. Good for big-group indecision.

name: Cafe Felix
vibe: Tech-park escape hatch. Quiet-ish, laptops welcome until it fills up.

name: Black Rabbit
vibe: Cocktail bar pretending to be a café. Low lights, long conversations.
